name: Understanding Exponential Weighted Volatility (EWMA) - Help center
snippet: The main objective of EWMA is to estimate the next-day (or period) volatility of a time series and closely track the volatility as it changes.

name: Exponentially Weighted Moving Models - arXiv
snippet: An exponentially weighted moving model (EWMM) for a vector time series fits a new data model each time period, based on an exponentially fading loss function ...

name: Exponentially Weighted Moving Average (EWMA) Explained
snippet: The Exponentially Weighted Moving Average is a way of smoothing data so that recent values matter more than older ones.

name: Exponential smoothing - Wikipedia
snippet: Exponential smoothing or exponential moving average (EMA) is a technique for smoothing time series data using the exponential window function.

name: Exponential weighted moving average : r/AskStatistics - Reddit
snippet: There are three types of EWMA methods that I'm familiar with: single EWMA, double EWMA, and triple EWMA. and gamma (seasonality).

name: EWMA Chart (Exponentially Weighted Moving Average Chart). Everything
snippet: EWMA chart assigns more weight to ongoing information focuses over more established centers, aiding in observing little stepwise deviations.

name: Comparative Study on Exponentially Weighted Moving Average  - MDPI
snippet: This study compared the properties of several exponentially weighted moving average methods as base models for the self-starting forecasting process.

name: Exponentially Weighted Average - Medium
snippet: The Exponentially Weighted Moving Average (EWMA) is commonly used as a smoothing technique in time series.
